Need answers?

Knoxville Comprehensive Breast Center has been providing women with confident answers you can trust for over 40 years.

We’re here to help every step of the way.

How can we help?

We accept insurance.

How We Can Help

At Knoxville Breast Center, we are committed to providing comprehensive care and support for your health and well-being. Our services are designed to offer guidance, early detection, and essential resources to help you stay proactive about your health.



Schedule Your Annual Mammogram

Regular screenings are essential for early detection. Schedule an appointment today to prioritize your breast health.



Felt Something Unusual?

If you’ve detected an unusual lump or change, don’t wait. Book an appointment for a professional evaluation and peace of mind.



Need a bra, wig, or compression garment?

We offer a curated selection of bras, wigs, and compression garments. Shop our boutique to find the perfect fit for your needs.



Ask a Question

Ask how we can support you through every step of your journey. From preventative care to specialized support, we are here to help.

Mobile Mammography

We’ll come to you because early detection is important.

We are Tennessee’s first mobile program with over 30 years of driving around East Tennessee and the newest 3D mammography.

Find a site near you

Our Services

Providing well-coordinated breast cancer screening, diagnosis, and treatment in a compassionate manner with dedicated breast specialists using the most innovative equipment and technology available.

Schedule Now

3D Screening Mammograms

A screening mammogram uses special x-ray technology specially designed for breasts to detect abnormal growths or changes in breast tissue.

learn more

Image-Guided Biopsies

This is a procedure used to diagnose a small mass or calcification’s seen with the mammogram.

learn more

Breast MRI

Specifically designed for use in breast screening and diagnostics, a breast MRI involves a specially-designed machine that provides high-resolution photos while maintaining breast sensitivity and comfort.

learn more

Screening Breast Ultrasound

Used to inform women who have a dense mammographic pattern that additional imaging, would be beneficial for breast cancer screening.

learn more

Second Opinion

Women who have had an abnormal screening mammogram or a questioned abnormal mammogram from an outside facility will be scheduled for a Second Opinion Evaluation.

learn more

Mobile Mammography

Mobile mammography services benefit women at or over the age of 40 who are not experiencing any breast problems.

learn more

Our Mission

​To save lives from breast cancer and breast disease.
